name: Paul Lavalle
abstract: Paul Lavalle (born Joseph Usifer, September 6, 1908 - June 24, 1997) was an American conductor, composer, arranger and performer on clarinet and saxophone.

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: Mr. Morehouse is an integral member of my organization, the Band of America... Paul Lavalle, Conductor of the City Service Band of America.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Barefield
about_quotes.evidence: We had become good friends, and he called me to come up and work with him at Freedom Land on tenor

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: Paul LaValle at that time was at NBC. And he says, Al, he says, how would you like to go with Toscanini?

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Barefield
about_quotes.evidence: they all were playing with Paul Lavalle so I was playing with them.
